zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt於1128年出生在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特時，他的父親Guillaume d'Harcourt38歲，母親Agnes Huguette d'Amboise39歲。他於1179年與Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1213年在法國享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt于1128年出生在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特时，他的父亲Guillaume d'Harcourt38岁，母亲Agnes Huguette d'Amboise39岁。他于1179年与Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1213年在法国享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: 'le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Vaillant'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Alphonse, Ambroise, Andre, Normand, Philias, Philippe.
French: nickname for a courageous or robust person, from Old French vaillant ‘sturdy, brave’. This surname is also found in Britain (compare Valiant ) and the Netherlands.

variants.name: Valiant
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French vaillant ‘courageous, reliable’.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt was born in 1128, in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume d'Harcourt, was 38 and his mother, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, was 39. He married Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont in 1179. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died in 1213, in France, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt est né en 1128, à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume d'Harcourt, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont en 1179. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé en 1213, à France, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt 1128 in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume d'Harcourt 38 und seine Mutter Agnes Huguette d'Amboise 39. Er hat 1179 Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb 1213 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt è nato il nel 1128 nel Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume d'Harcourt, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont nel 1179. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1213, nel Francia, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourtが1128年にフランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Harcourtは38歳，母Agnes Huguette d'Amboiseは39歳であった。1179年にJeanne de Meulan de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1213年にフランスで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt(이)가 1128년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume d'Harcourt(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Huguette d'Amboise(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1179년 Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1213년 프랑스에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt nasceu em 1128, em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume d'Harcourt, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont em 1179. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1213, em França, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt родился в 1128 г. в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume d'Harcourt было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont в 1179 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер в 1213 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert II 'le Vaillant' d'Harcourt nació en 1128, en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume d'Harcourt, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes Huguette d'Amboise, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Meulan de Beaumont en 1179. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1213, en Francia, a la edad de 85 años.
